summary: Chevron Chairman & CEO Mike Wirth discusses the impact of the war in Iran on oil prices and global supplies, multiple attacks this week on vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz, the company’s view on Venezuela, and potential oil and gasoline shortages. He speaks on “Bloomberg Surveillance.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 日本过去一个月动用创纪录的 736 亿美元支撑日元
summary: Japan used a record of almost $74 billion over the past month to prop up the yen after the currency slid past 160 per dollar, according to Finance Ministry data confirming the government’s first market intervention since 2024.

summary: Summer events including the FIFA World Cup and America’s 250th anniversary could spur sales of sweet treats, making now a key time to snap up beaten-down shares of Hershey Co., according to the candy and snack maker’s newest Wall Street bull.

summary: Czech billionaire Daniel Kretinsky said he’s open to increasing his holding in TotalEnergies SE, after gaining a stake in the French oil major last month.

summary: Gold rose as reports that the US and Iran reached a preliminary deal to extend their ceasefire eased expectations of higher-for-longer interest rates.

title_cn: 美伊协议乐观情绪推动股市维持历史高位彭博简报 2026 年 5 月 29 日

SpaceX is said to cut its IPO valuation to at least $1.8 trillion while Anthropic's newest funding round puts its valuation at $965 billion eclipsing rival OpenAI. Cole Smead of Smead Capital Management discusses the 'mania' in tech stocks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Must Signal Commitment to Inflation, Schmid Says

summary: Federal Reserve Bank of Kansas City President Jeff Schmid said officials should make it clear they’re willing to do what is needed to achieve price stability. “We must continue to signal our commitment to price stability and our willingness to take the actions necessary to achieve our mandate,” Schmid said Friday at a conference in Reykjavík, Iceland. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: The aluminum market is facing a deepening shortage as the closure of the Strait of Hormuz throttles supply, with spot prices for the metal spiking while exchange inventories slump.

title: Zurich Bank Looks to Brazil, Florida as It Expands in Americas
title_cn: 苏黎世银行在美洲扩张时将目光投向巴西和佛罗里达州
summary: EFG International AG, a private-banking boutique based in Zurich, is expanding its 300-person team serving clients from the Americas with an emphasis on Brazil and South Florida.

title: Tentative US-Iran Deal & SpaceX Cuts Valuation | The Pulse 5/29/2026
title_cn: 美伊暂定协议和 SpaceX 下调估值 |脉搏 2026 年 5 月 29 日
summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Seema Shah, Principal Asset Management, Chief Global Strategist; Aditi Venkatram, Jefferies, Equity Capital Markets Managing Director; Nate Soares, Machine Intelligence Research Institute, President & Author, ‘If Anyone Builds It, Everyone Dies’ (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Earnings a Cushion for US Equity Markets, HSBC’s Kettner Says
title_cn: 汇丰银行的凯特纳表示，科技股盈利为美国股市提供缓冲
summary: Max Kettner, chief multi-asset strategist at HSBC, says the strength of tech earnings “made us care a little less about higher yields.” He speaks on “Bloomberg Surveillance.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Danish Pension Fund to Blacklist ‘Grossly Overvalued’ SpaceX
title_cn: 丹麦养老基金将“估值严重高估”的 SpaceX 列入黑名单
summary: A Danish pension fund that earlier this year made headlines by ditching Treasuries as Donald Trump was threatening to seize Greenland now says it won’t touch SpaceX.

title: Former SocGen Chair says Bank's Governance is 'Best in Class'
title_cn: 法国兴业银行前主席表示该银行的治理是“同类最佳”
summary: The former Chair of Société Générale, Lorenzo Bini Smaghi, has stepped down after more than a decade at the helm. Bini Smaghi says he leaves the lender with 'best in class' governance and a share price 60% higher than when he joined. But he added that the restructuring is not fully over and there are big deals to come. Bini Smaghi joined Lizzy Burden on 'The Pulse'. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 人工智能曾经是生成性的。现在一切都与代理有关
summary: Corporate speak has changed when it comes to describing the evolving technology

title_cn: Ocado 达成协议升级 Asda 在线销售系统
summary: Ocado Group Plc struck a deal to help British grocer Asda lift online sales, a boost for the company’s automated technology after a series of setbacks.

title: It’s Summertime and AI Means Internships Aren’t Easy
title_cn: 暑假来临，人工智能意味着实习并不容易
summary: With chatbots like Claude around, more companies are cutting back on internships.

title: The Nightmare of Finding a Summer Internship in the Age of AI
title_cn: 人工智能时代寻找暑期实习的噩梦
summary: An important rite of passage for college students is slipping away as companies use AI for more busywork and prepare for a future with fewer entry-level positions.

title: Dell Shares Soar 40% After Outlook Tops Estimates on AI Boom
title_cn: 展望人工智能热潮，戴尔股价飙升 40%
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. shares surged 38% in premarket trading Friday after the hardware maker gave an outlook for annual sales that far surpassed analysts’ estimates, fueled by demand for servers that power artificial intelligence work.

title: Jupiter Fund Taps Europe AI Energy Boom to Beat 91% of Peers
title_cn: Jupiter 基金利用欧洲人工智能能源热潮击败 91% 的同行
summary: Homing in on stocks at the heart of Europe’s electrification push has helped a Jupiter Asset Management fund team outperform 91% of its peers this year.

title: Principal's Shah: We Don't See Markets Repricing Fed Cuts
title_cn: 校长沙阿：我们没有看到市场重新定价美联储降息
summary: Seema Shah, Chief Global Strategist at Principal Asset Management, discusses the outlook for bond yields, equities pricing and Federal Reserve Policy. "It's gonna be important to watch how the bond yield market progresses," Shah says on Bloomberg Television. "From our perspective, though, we don't expect to see markets repricing Fed cuts." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Key Themes to Watch at Asia’s Biggest AI Tech Show
title_cn: 亚洲最大的人工智能科技展值得关注的关键主题
summary: Nvidia Corp.’s Jensen Huang leads a parade of AI computing leaders in Taiwan for Asia’s biggest technology showcase, Computex. Over a jam-packed week, the hardware linchpins of the post-ChatGPT era will debate the most pressing issues facing their industry, from growing bottlenecks in the supply of essential components like memory chips to the rise of challengers to Nvidia at the apex of the semiconductor hierarchy.

title: Lenovo Doubles in Best Month Since 1999 on AI-Fueled Rally
title_cn: 人工智能推动股价上涨，联想股价实现 1999 年以来最佳月度翻倍
summary: Lenovo Group Ltd. recorded its best month in more than a quarter-century, with the stock doubling in May as investor enthusiasm built around the company’s AI-driven growth outlook.

title: Gita Gopinath on Why Interest Rates Have Surged All Around the World | Odd Lots
title_cn: 吉塔·戈皮纳特 (Gita Gopinath) 谈全球利率飙升的原因零股
summary: There's been a massive selloff in the bond market and rates are rising globally. Japan, Korea, the UK... You name it. Gita Gopinath — Harvard economics professor and the former first deputy managing director of the IMF — has long warned that bond markets are "in a fragile place." She sees a combo of demographics, high levels of public debt, and the intense capital needs of the AI boom creating inflationary pressure all around the world. Today we speak with Gopinath about the seeming disconnect between stocks and bonds and why investors may be wrong to assume that governments will have their back the next time there's a major shock. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI is Creating More Work for Australia’s Workplace Tribunal
title_cn: 人工智能正在为澳大利亚工作场所法庭创造更多工作
summary: Australia’s Fair Work Commission announced a review of its processes to cope with an influx of cases being lodged with the help of generative AI assistance tools, which it said has contributed to an estimated 70% workload increase over a three-year period.

title: China’s Wuxi Taclink Is Said to Mull Rare Listing in Singapore
title_cn: 传中国无锡德科立考虑在新加坡罕见上市
summary: Wuxi Taclink Optoelectronics Technology Co. is considering a listing in Singapore, a potential first for any company that already trades shares in mainland China, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Rocket Explosion Deals Blow to Blue Origin's Space Ambitions
title_cn: 火箭爆炸交易打击了蓝色起源的太空野心
summary: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket exploded in a massive fireball while undergoing a test on a Florida launchpad Thursday evening, dealing a major setback to the Jeff Bezos-backed firm in its efforts to challenge a dominant SpaceX. Blue Origin and Amazon founder Jeff Bezos said it was too early to determine the cause of the explosion and described it as "a very rough day" in a post on X. Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Matt Bloxham joined Caroline Hepker to discuss the implications. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: HSG Is Said to Be in Lead to Buy Blackstone-Backed Leica Camera
title_cn: 据称 HSG 已率先购买黑石支持的徕卡相机
summary: HSG has emerged as the leading bidder for a stake in German high-end camera maker Leica Camera AG, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: $2.3 Trillion Norway Fund Backs Human Rights Review at Palantir
title_cn: 挪威基金 2.3 万亿美元支持 Palantir 人权审查
summary: Norway’s $2.3 trillion wealth fund supported all shareholder proposals at Palantir Technologies Inc. as the fund’s growing politicization puts its investments under closer scrutiny by the Nordic country’s public.

title: Control Risks: Sustainable Peace Outlook in Iran War Poor
title_cn: 控制风险：伊朗战争的可持续和平前景不佳
summary: Control Risks Partner Angela Mancini believes the outlook for a sustainable peace that meets the priorities of the primary threat actors in the Iran war remains very poor. She speaks with Haslinda Amin on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan Turns to Anime to Help Kids Avoid Bears As Attacks Triple
title_cn: 随着熊袭击事件增加三倍，日本借助动漫帮助孩子们躲避熊
summary: Struggling to rein in a surge in bear attacks, Japan has turned to anime to teach children how to avoid a potentially deadly encounter.

title: Apollo Seeks Partners for $36B Debt Deal to Buy AI Chips for Anthropic
title_cn: Apollo 寻求合作伙伴进行 36B 美元债务交易，为 Anthropic 购买人工智能芯片
summary: Apollo and Blackstone are working to bring additional investors into a roughly $36 billion debt financing deal to help Anthropic build out its AI infrastructure. The debt will be used to purchase Google’s custom chips known as tensor processing units, or TPUs, which Anthropic will then lease, according to people with knowledge of the matter. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Taiwan Brokerages Seek $1.4 Billion of Loans, Adding to Rush
title_cn: 台湾券商寻求 14 亿美元贷款，加剧市场热潮
summary: Three Taiwanese securities firms are seeking around $1.4 billion of new loans, according to people familiar with the matter, adding to a rush of recent fundraising as a stock market boom stokes demand for financial services.

title: New Buyers Enter Market for Anti-Drone Systems, Terma CEO Says
title_cn: Terma 首席执行官表示，新买家进入反无人机系统市场
summary: When Terma A/S began selling technology to protect critical infrastructure more than a decade ago, its clients were mostly airports, ports, and power facilities in the Middle East. Today, Denmark’s largest defense company is fielding inquiries from embassies and even museums as demand for counter-drone systems surges.

title: Singapore’s Sea Sets Up AI Investment Team as Part of Pivot
title_cn: 新加坡海洋成立人工智能投资团队作为 Pivot 的一部分
summary: Sea Ltd. has set up a dedicated team to scout for new investments in AI, part of a broader effort to accelerate forays into the technology as it hunts for its next growth engine beyond e-commerce.

title: Samsung, SK Rally Sparks Forced Selling as Funds Hit Limits
title_cn: 资金触及极限，三星、SK 涨势引发被迫抛售
summary: A blistering rally in Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. has turned into an unexpected headache for some funds, whose positions have grown so large they’re now forced to sell.

title: Job Market Jitters as AI Demand Grows: Markets Snapshot
title_cn: 随着人工智能需求的增长，就业市场出现紧张：市场快照
summary:
Equity benchmarks across Asia and the US saw new highs this week, driven by optimism around the resonant AI trade despite growing concerns of potential disruptions to the labor market. 
The Opening Trade spoke with industry experts and leading market voices on how companies and regions are preparing for a latent transformation to jobs.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investors Bet Big on Humanoid Robots
title_cn: 投资者在人形机器人上押下重注
summary: the Humanoids Summit in Tokyo gathers leading companies, builders, and investors from around the world for live humanoid demonstrations and talks on commercialization, mass production, and safety. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Congo Defends Ebola Response as WHO Warns Contact Tracing Is Failing
title_cn: 世界卫生组织警告接触者追踪失败，刚果捍卫埃博拉应对措施
summary: Congo’s health minister pushed back against claims the country’s Ebola outbreak was spiraling out of control, even as World Health Organization officials warned insecurity and population displacement were preventing responders from tracing most suspected contacts.

title: China’s Troubled Consumer Funds Turn to Tech Stock Pickers
title_cn: 中国陷入困境的消费基金转向科技选股
summary: China’s battered consumer-focused funds are showing signs of pivoting to tech as a prolonged demand slump forces even the sector’s most committed backers to rethink their strategy.

title: Why The SpaceX IPO Is Unlike Any Other
title_cn: 为什么 SpaceX 的 IPO 与众不同
summary: What began as a rocket startup is now a big bet on satellites, AI and Mars. With a projected valuation of at least $1.8 trillion, SpaceX’s IPO could reshape markets. But is Wall Street rushing in too fast? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, Iran Near Deal on Extended Truce Pending Trump Approval
title_cn: 美国和伊朗即将就延长休战协议达成协议，等待特朗普批准
summary: The US and Iran have reached a preliminary deal to extend a ceasefire by 60 days and discuss the future of Tehran’s nuclear program, a person with knowledge of the matter said, buoying hopes for a resolution to a three-month conflict that has killed thousands and roiled the global economy.

title: Russia Heads for Showdown With Armenia Over Europea Outreach
title_cn: 俄罗斯将与亚美尼亚就欧洲事务展开摊牌
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin joined a summit of the Moscow-led Eurasian Economic Union on Friday amid growing tensions with Armenia over its shift toward Europe.

title: EU to Unlock €16.4 Billion of Aid to Hungary in Win for Magyar
title_cn: 欧盟将向匈牙利提供164亿欧元援助以赢得马扎尔的胜利
summary: The European Union has reached a deal with Budapest to unlock €16.4 billion ($19.1 billion) in frozen funding for Hungary subject to reforms, offering much-needed relief to the country’s stretched budget.

title: Bulgaria Advances Anti-Graft Law to Unlock €370 Million EU Aid
title_cn: 保加利亚推进反腐败法以获得3.7亿欧元欧盟援助
summary: Bulgarian lawmakers approved on Friday a bill creating an anti-corruption body, a crucial step to unlock hundreds of millions of euros in delayed European Union recovery funding.

title: Ships Attacked in Strait of Hormuz This Week, Chevron CEO Says
title_cn: 雪佛龙首席执行官表示，本周有船只在霍尔木兹海峡遭到袭击
summary: Several vessels transiting through the Strait of Hormuz have been attacked in recent days, underscoring the “very real” risks that remain for shipowners in the Persian Gulf whether or not a peace accord is signed, Chevron Corp. Chief Executive Officer Mike Wirth said.

title: Ebola Border Closures Block Aid Needed to Stop Virus’s Spread
title_cn: 埃博拉边境关闭阻碍了阻止病毒传播所需的援助
summary: Travel restrictions and border closures are hindering the response to Ebola as aid workers say they are battling to get to some of the areas where the outbreak has been the most vicious.

title: Iran Hosts Reconstruction, Investment Event Amid Sign of US Deal
title_cn: 伊朗在美国签署协议之际举办重建和投资活动
summary: Iran is hosting an investment and reconstruction conference as it appears to be inching closer to an agreement with the US that could pave the way for a permanent truce with Washington.

title: EU Warns Trade Relationship With China Is ‘Not Sustainable’
title_cn: 欧盟警告与中国的贸易关系“不可持续”
summary: The European Union cautioned that its economic relationship with China must change as the bloc begins considering tougher measures to counteract growing imbalances.

title: Republicans Approach Summer Still Searching for a Win
title_cn: 共和党人临近夏季仍在寻求胜利
summary: The slipping calendar adds to doubts about the party passing another major bill this year

title: Grocery Shoppers Are In For a Summer of Pain
title_cn: 杂货购物者将经历一个痛苦的夏天
summary: The Iran war’s effects will keep rippling through the supply chain, even if it ends.

title: The Indian Club That Outlasted The British May Not Survive Modi
title_cn: 比英国人更长久的印度俱乐部可能无法在莫迪手中幸存
summary: The Indian government is pushing to evict the Delhi Gymkhana Club, one of the country’s most storied and exclusive colonial-era social clubs, touching off a fierce fight among the city’s elite — even as it evokes a collective shrug among its young and newly wealthy.

title: College Mergers Take a Long Time. Trump Officials Want to Speed Them Up
title_cn: 大学合并需要很长时间。特朗普官员希望加快速度
summary: The US Department of Education wants to grease the wheels for college mergers and acquisitions, a rare Trump administration proposal with broad support from university leaders who see the policy helping the sector withstand a wave of financial distress.

title: Italy’s Growth Was Robust at Start of 2026 in Surprise Revision
title_cn: 意大利2026年初经济增长强劲 令人意外的修正
summary: Italy’s economy grew more than initially estimated at the start of 2026, keeping up momentum from last year before the shock of the Iran war impacted growth.

title: Magyar on Cusp of Sealing Deal on EU Funds in Hungary Budget Win
title_cn: 马扎尔即将在匈牙利预算案中达成欧盟基金协议
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar said he expected to reach a deal with the European Union later on Friday that would allow billions of euros in frozen funding to be unlocked, in much-needed relief to the stretched budget.

title: China’s Deepening Embrace of Canada
title_cn: 中国加深对加拿大的拥抱
summary: Foreign Minister Wang Yi’s visit hints at the global realignment now under way.

title: Philippine Court Orders Arrest of Senator Over Graft Scandal
title_cn: 菲律宾法院因贪污丑闻下令逮捕参议员
summary: A Philippine court on Friday ordered the arrest of Senator Jinggoy Estrada after he was charged for allegedly receiving millions of pesos in an infrastructure corruption scheme.

title: Russia Hands Agriculture Tycoon’s Assets to State Bank
title_cn: 俄罗斯将农业大亨的资产交给国家银行
summary: Russia placed the business of Ros Agro Plc, one of the country’s largest agricultural holdings, under the management of a state bank after a Moscow court ordered the nationalization of billionaire Vadim Moshkovich’s share in the company.

title: Court Halts US Plan for Kenya Ebola Facility Over Health Risks
title_cn: 法院因健康风险而终止美国对肯尼亚埃博拉病毒设施的计划
summary: A Kenyan high court temporarily blocked the government from approving a deal with the US to establish an Ebola quarantine facility in the East African nation after a human rights group said the plan posed “grave health risks” to the public.

title: Australia’s Marles Defends Defense Budget, Welcomes Japan Ties
title_cn: 澳大利亚马尔斯捍卫国防预算，欢迎日本关系
summary: Australia’s deputy prime minister defended the nation’s defense spending ahead of a meeting with his US counterpart, arguing that his country spends a larger share of its economy on the military than Germany, France or the UK.

title: Investors Warm to Pro-Trump Colombian Outsider Ahead of Election
title_cn: 大选前投资者对支持特朗普的哥伦比亚局外人表现出热情
summary: A celebrity attorney who represented some of the nation’s most notorious crime bosses and who refers to himself as “the tiger” has unexpectedly emerged as investors’ best hope of averting a market rout in Colombia.

title: Xi’s US Youth Initiative Hits 50,000 Goal Ahead of Schedule
title_cn: 习近平的美国青年计划提前实现5万目标
summary: China said it has met President Xi Jinping’s goal of bringing 50,000 young Americans to the country ahead of schedule, showcasing a milestone after a Beijing summit with Donald Trump steadied bilateral ties.

title: Netanyahu Says Israel Will Expand Control Over Gaza Strip to 70%
title_cn: 内塔尼亚胡称以色列将把对加沙地带的控制权扩大到70%
summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu ordered the army to expand its control over Gaza’s territory, further squeezing the war-torn enclave.

title: South East Water Seeks Fix After Credit Downgrade to Junk
title_cn: 信用评级下调至垃圾级后，东南水务寻求修复
summary: South East Water Ltd. is in talks with industry watchdog Ofwat to retain its license after its debt was downgraded to junk by Moody’s Ratings.

title: Bessent Says Congress Will Decide If Trump's Face Goes on a $250 Bill
title_cn: 贝森特表示国会将决定特朗普的头像是否出现在250美元的钞票上
summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent defended the idea of putting President Donald Trump’s face on a specially issued $250 bill, a move that is currently barred by the law. "At Treasury, we prepare things in advance," Bessent told reporters on Thursday. "We have prepared in advance that if the legislation is passed, but we will stick to the law." Bessent says it's up to Congress to change the restrictions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Cuts IPO Valuation By $200 Billion | Daybreak Europe 05/29/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 将 IPO 估值下调 2000 亿美元欧洲黎明 05/29/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

SpaceX is currently targeting a valuation of at least $1.8 trillion in its initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as Elon Musk’s rocket and artificial intelligence company nears its debut.

The US and Iran have reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire by 60 days and launch further talks on Tehran’s nuclear program, a person with knowledge of the matter said, raising hopes the three-month conflict could be nearing a resolution.

And Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket exploded in a massive fireball while undergoing a test on a Florida launchpad.

Today's guest: Ankita Amajuri, Pantheon Macroeconomics, Europe Economist. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Warns of Retaliation Ahead of EU Meeting on Trade Curbs
title_cn: 中国警告在欧盟贸易限制会议前进行报复
summary: China issued a sharp warning to the European Union hours before a meeting to discuss potential EU curbs on Chinese exports, setting the stage for a renewed trade barb between the economies.

title: Indonesia’s Surprisingly Good GDP Has Analysts Doubting the Data
title_cn: 印尼GDP出人意料地好，分析师对数据表示怀疑
summary: Economists are increasingly doubting Indonesia’s robust growth narrative under President Prabowo Subianto, with the skepticism spilling over into a rare public debate over the reliability of the country’s economic data.

title: US-Iran Peace Prospects Rise as Trump Weighs Fresh Truce
title_cn: 特朗普考虑新的休战协议，美伊和平前景上升
summary: The US and Iran reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire by 60 days and launch further talks on Tehran’s nuclear program, a person with knowledge of the matter said, raising hopes the three-month conflict could be nearing a resolution. President Donald Trump has yet to agree to the terms. Bloomberg's Jon Herskovitz reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Slovenian Premier Jansa Picks His Lawyer as Interior Minister
title_cn: 斯洛文尼亚总理扬萨任命其律师为内政部长
summary: Slovenian nationalist leader Janez Jansa unveiled his cabinet late on Thursday, with a surprise pick of his lawyer Franci Matoz for the post of the nation’s interior minister.

title: Norway Presses EU to Drop Ban on Arctic Drilling of Oil and Gas
title_cn: 挪威敦促欧盟取消北极石油和天然气钻探禁令
summary: Norway is putting pressure on the European Union to remove a moratorium on new oil and gas drilling in the Arctic where almost two thirds of its petroleum resources lie.
